# CloudCosmos

CloudCosmos is a U.S.-based technology and software company working with mid-market businesses, startups, and product teams nationwide, with particular depth on the East Coast and in the Midwest. The company has also delivered work for clients in India and the Middle East.

## Site
- Homepage: https://cloudcosmos.tech/
- Contact: mailto:info@cloudcosmos.tech
- Operating footprint: Raleigh, North Carolina; Bengaluru, India; Mohali/Chandigarh, India

## Services
- AI and information retrieval
- Legacy modernization
- Digital transformation
- Platform engineering
- Startup build partnerships

## Experience
- Work delivered for a leading global consulting firm
- Work across tax, legal information, and compliance software domains

## Capabilities
- LLM applications and retrieval-augmented systems
- Search relevance and ranking
- Computer vision and document understanding
- Platform engineering and cloud delivery
- Architecture modernization and software transformation
- AI-native engineering workflows, agentic delivery patterns, and reusable internal automation

## Leadership
- Manoj Bharadwaj, CEO, Director (USA)
- Aarti Bharadwaj, COO, Director (USA)
- Satish P, Country Head, India
- Roopa R, Director, Operations (India)
